proof: function[T0](x0: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[T](x)
function[T0](x0: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[T](y)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x2) != x0(x1) or x2 = x1 } = is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) }[T, T](identity_fn[T])
let w0: T satisfy { exists(k0: T) { identity_fn(k0) = identity_fn(w0) and k0 != w0 } }
let w1: T satisfy { identity_fn(w0) = identity_fn(w1) and w0 != w1 }
let w2: T satisfy { identity_fn(w0) = identity_fn(w2) and w0 != w2 }
function(x0: T, x1: T) { identity_fn(x0) != identity_fn(x1) or x0 = x1 }(w0, w2)
function[T0](x0: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[T](y)
function(x0: T) { identity_fn(x0) != y }(y)
function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0) { forall(x1: T0) { exists(k0: T1) { x0(k0) = x1 } } = is_surjective_fn[T1, T0](x0) }[T, T](identity_fn[T])
let w0: T satisfy { forall(x0: T) { identity_fn(x0) != w0 } }
function(x0: T) { exists(k0: T) { identity_fn(k0) = x0 } }(w0)
let w1: T satisfy { identity_fn(w1) = w0 }
let w2(arg0: T) -> w2_result: T satisfy { identity_fn(w2_result) = arg0 }
function(x0: T) { identity_fn(w2(x0)) = x0 }(w0)
(forall(x1: T) { identity_fn(x1) != w0 } = true)
function(x0: T) { identity_fn(x0) != w0 }(w2(w0))
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1) { (is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) and is_surjective_fn[T0, T1](x0)) = is_bijection_fn[T0, T1](x0) }[T, T](identity_fn[T])
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { identity_bijection[T0](x0).map(x1) = identity_fn[T0](x1) }[T](anchor, x)
function[T0](x0: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[T](x)

goal: compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, h).map = compose[T, U, V](e.map, h.map)
compose[T, U, V](e.map, h.map, x) = e.map(h.map(x))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[T, U, V](e.map, h.map, x)

goal: compose_bijection[A, C, D](f, compose_bijection[A, B, C](g, h)).map = compose_bijection[A, B, D](compose_bijection[B, C, D](f, g), h).map
compose_bijection[T, U, T](inverse_bijection[T, U](e), e).map(x) = inverse_bijection[T, U](e).map(e.map(x))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Bijection[T2, T1], x1: Bijection[T0, T2], x2: T0) { compose_bijection[T0, T2, T1](x0, x1).map(x2) = x0.map(x1.map(x2)) }[T, T, U](inverse_bijection[T, U](e), e, x)

goal: compose_bijection[T, U, T](inverse_bijection[T, U](e), e).map(x) = identity_bijection(anchor).map(x)
compose_bijection[U, T, U](e, inverse_bijection[T, U](e)).map(y) = e.map(inverse_bijection[T, U](e).map(y))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Bijection[T2, T1], x1: Bijection[T0, T2], x2: T0) { compose_bijection[T0, T2, T1](x0, x1).map(x2) = x0.map(x1.map(x2)) }[U, U, T](e, inverse_bijection[T, U](e), y)

goal: compose_bijection[U, T, U](e, inverse_bijection[T, U](e)).map(y) = identity_bijection(anchor).map(y)

proof: function[T0: Inhabited, T1](x0: Bijection[T0, T1], x1: T1) { x0.map(inverse_bijection[T0, T1](x0).map(x1)) = x1 }[U, T](inverse_bijection[T, U](e), x)
